document_structure.title: Directorate of Medical Education, A.P. - Recognized Hospitals List
document_structure.semantic_summary: Official abstract and detailed list of recognized hospitals across various districts in Andhra Pradesh, issued by the Directorate of Medical Education, Vijayawada, as of February 2026.

children.title: Abstract
children.semantic_summary: Statistical summary of recognized hospitals per district including Vizianagaram, Srikakulam, and Visakhapatnam.

chunks.text: OFFICE OF THE OIRECTORATE OF MEDICAL EDUCATION, A.P.: VIJAYAWADA ABSTRACT. S.No. (1) Name of the Districts (2) No. of Hospitals As on 19-02-2026 (3). Vizianagaram 24, Srikakulam 28, Visakhapatnam 80. Total 427.
